calendar.matters:
Petition For Relief From Government Code Section 945.4
Off Calendar Apr-09-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the Court adopts the tentative ruling.

PETITIONER ABUON MAYEN's Petition For Relief From Government Code Section 945.4 is granted. Ms. Mayen has adequately shown that her failure to present a timely claim to respondent City and County of San Francisco was due to her excusable neglect and the City has not shown that it would be prejudiced in its defense of the claim if this petition is granted.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Christine Jordan, CSR#12262, email: cjordan@sftc.org.

ORDER SIGNED AFTER HEARING.
